description_en: Malaga may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 38 halal restaurants and 17 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Malaga, Spain, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Malaga: 38 halal restaurants listed, 17 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.4/5.
